code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut num = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -num)
          else
            result = list.push(result, num)
          end
          has = false
          neg = false
          num = 0
        end
      else if b == 45 and not has
        neg = true
        has = true
      else if b == 43 and not has
        has = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -num)
    else
      result = list.push(result, num)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn emit(_ x: Int, _ y: Int) -> Unit
  let s = x + y
  print("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
end

fn process(_ a: String, _ b: String) -> Unit
  let xs = parse_line(a)
  let ys = parse_line(b)
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      match ys.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        emit(x, y)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(a)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(b)
    process(a, b)
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
